title: wolftpm-src/build.rs: no-transport path on non-Linux compiles silently unusable library
description: When neither linux-dev nor swtpm feature is selected on a non-Linux target (macOS, Windows), generate_wolftpm_options emits no WOLFTPM_LINUX_DEV or WOLFTPM_SWTPM define. wolfTPM's hal/tpm_io.h is left without a transport definition, which may produce a cryptic compile or link error. Fix: add an explicit panic\! in the build script when no transport is selected on non-Linux, with a message explaining which feature to enable.
